expectations.text: Response contains required substrings (InsertError, raise_err=True, ProbeType).
expectations.evidence: All required substrings present multiple times.

expectations.text: Response does not contain forbidden substrings (reinsert=True before, should super_delete).
expectations.evidence: Forbidden substrings absent verbatim. Response actively warns AGAINST 'reinsert=True before reading InsertError' and against using super_delete to wipe rows.

expectations.text: Inspects common_usage.InsertError first (with the session's nwb_file_name restriction)
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'read common_usage.InsertError first (do not re-run yet)' with `(InsertError & {nwb_file_name: ...}).fetch(as_dict=True)`.

expectations.text: Mentions missing Probe rows often indicate upstream DataAcquisitionDevice / ProbeType dependency
expectations.evidence: 'almost always an upstream ancestor row that failed silently ... two upstream candidates are ProbeType (hard FK on Probe) and DataAcquisitionDevice (nullable FK on Probe)'.
